name: AI / Model
description: Foundation models, ML systems, evaluation, and production AI

roles.title: Chief AI Officer
roles.about: Set the strategic direction for all AI systems at EduRankAI. Own the roadmap for model development, responsible deployment, and AI-driven product innovation.
responsibilities: Define and own EduRankAI's AI strategy and multi-year model roadmap
Lead hiring and development of the AI research and engineering teams
Oversee safety, alignment, and responsible deployment standards
Collaborate with Chief Scientist and CTO to align research with product
Evaluate build vs. partner decisions for foundational model capabilities
eligibility: PhD or equivalent research experience in AI/ML preferred
10+ years in AI/ML with 3+ years in leadership
Track record of shipping production AI systems at scale

roles.title: AI Systems Architect
roles.about: Design the end-to-end architecture of EduRankAI's AI platform — from data ingestion and model training to serving infrastructure and feedback loops.
responsibilities: Architect scalable AI platform components end-to-end
Define data, model, and serving layers for all AI products
Establish engineering standards and architectural governance
Mentor senior engineers and guide technical roadmaps
eligibility: 8+ years in software/ML engineering, 3+ in architecture
Experience designing large-scale ML or AI systems in production

roles.title: Model Architecture Lead
roles.about: Lead decisions on model architecture choices across EduRankAI's AI systems — from transformer variants to novel architectures.
responsibilities: Define model architecture standards and decision frameworks
Evaluate new architectures from research for production applicability
Lead architecture review for all new model proposals
Collaborate with research and engineering on implementation
Document architecture decisions and their rationale
eligibility: 7+ years ML engineering or research
Deep expertise in transformer and LLM architectures
Strong publication record or equivalent applied output

roles.title: AI Platform Lead
roles.about: Own EduRankAI's AI platform — the internal infrastructure that enables fast, reliable model development and deployment.
responsibilities: Build and maintain the internal AI development platform
Standardise tooling for training, evaluation, and deployment
Enable ML engineers and researchers with self-serve infrastructure
Define SLAs and reliability standards for AI platform services
eligibility: 6+ years in platform or ML engineering
Experience building internal developer platforms
Strong infrastructure and operations background

roles.title: Senior ML Engineer
roles.about: Own the performance and efficiency of EduRankAI's core models.
responsibilities: Optimize model training runs for throughput and cost efficiency
Implement PEFT methods (LoRA, QLoRA) for targeted fine-tuning
Benchmark model quality and regression-test across releases
Support inference team with model export and quantization
eligibility: 5+ years ML engineering experience
Hands-on with large model training (1B+ parameters preferred)

roles.title: Inference Engineer
roles.about: Make EduRankAI's models fast, reliable, and cost-effective in production.
responsibilities: Design and optimise model serving pipelines for sub-100ms latency
Implement quantization, pruning, and distillation strategies
Monitor and alert on inference SLAs in production
eligibility: 5+ years in backend or ML engineering
Demonstrated experience optimizing inference latency

roles.title: Model Compression Engineer
roles.about: Specialise in making EduRankAI's models smaller, faster, and more efficient without sacrificing quality.
responsibilities: Research and apply quantization, pruning, and distillation techniques
Benchmark compression methods on EduRankAI's model suite
Work with inference team to deploy compressed models
Document compression workflows and quality tradeoffs
eligibility: 4+ years ML engineering with compression focus
Strong understanding of model internals and efficiency techniques

roles.title: AI Evaluation Scientist
roles.about: Design and own EduRankAI's model evaluation infrastructure — ensuring models meet quality, safety, and performance bars before deployment.
responsibilities: Design evaluation frameworks for EduRankAI's educational AI models
Build automated evaluation pipelines and benchmarks
Run human evaluation studies and analyse results
Define quality gates for model releases
Collaborate with safety team on safety evaluations
eligibility: 4+ years in ML evaluation, NLP, or research
Experience designing or running large-scale model evaluations

roles.title: LLM Research Scientist
roles.about: Conduct original research on large language model architectures, training methods, and capabilities.
responsibilities: Design and run research experiments on LLM architecture and training
Publish findings at leading AI research venues
Collaborate with engineering to bring research into production
Stay current with the research frontier and synthesise for the team
eligibility: PhD in AI, ML, or NLP with strong publication record
Experience training large-scale language models

roles.title: Applied AI Engineer
roles.about: Build production AI applications using retrieval-augmented generation, agent orchestration, and LLM APIs.
responsibilities: Build and maintain RAG pipelines with vector search backends
Develop agent orchestration flows
Integrate LLM APIs with product features
Collaborate with product and UX teams on AI-powered interfaces
eligibility: 3+ years in software or ML engineering
Production experience with LLM APIs

roles.title: ML Engineer
roles.about: Fine-tune and adapt pre-trained models for EduRankAI's specific educational use cases.
responsibilities: Run supervised fine-tuning experiments on domain-specific datasets
Manage experiment tracking with W&B or MLflow
Prepare and clean training datasets
eligibility: 3+ years in ML engineering or research
Experience fine-tuning LLMs on custom datasets

roles.title: Embedding Engineer
roles.about: Own EduRankAI's embedding systems — from model selection and fine-tuning to production serving.
responsibilities: Evaluate and fine-tune embedding models for educational content
Build embedding pipelines for semantic search and retrieval
Maintain vector database infrastructure
Benchmark embedding quality for downstream tasks
eligibility: 3+ years in ML engineering
Experience with embedding models and vector search

roles.title: Prompt Engineer
roles.about: Design, test, and optimise prompts for EduRankAI's language models.
responsibilities: Design structured prompts for product features
A/B test prompt variations
Build a versioned prompt library
Research emerging prompt techniques
eligibility: 1+ year working with LLM APIs
Strong written English and analytical mindset

roles.title: AI Evaluation Analyst
roles.about: Support the evaluation team by running benchmarks, scoring model outputs, and maintaining evaluation datasets.
responsibilities: Run benchmark suites and record results
Score model outputs against rubrics
Help maintain evaluation dataset libraries
Prepare reports for the model review process
eligibility: 1+ year in ML, data, or analytical role
Basic Python skills
BS in CS, Statistics, or related field

roles.title: Junior ML Engineer
roles.about: Support the ML engineering team with training runs, fine-tuning experiments, and dataset work.
responsibilities: Assist with fine-tuning experiments under senior guidance
Prepare and clean ML training datasets
Monitor training jobs and alert on anomalies
Document experiment results and configurations
eligibility: 1–2 years in ML engineering or strong academic ML background
BS in CS, ML, or Engineering

roles.title: Prompt Tester
roles.about: Help stress-test EduRankAI's AI models by exploring edge cases, adversarial inputs, and unexpected prompt scenarios.
responsibilities: Execute structured test plans on LLM prompts and outputs
Explore adversarial inputs and document failure modes
Log results systematically
Assist in building a catalogue of edge-case test cases
eligibility: Currently enrolled in or recently completed any undergraduate degree
No prior ML experience required — training provided
Availability: 2.5 hrs/day, 5 days/week

roles.title: AI Evaluation Intern
roles.about: Support the AI evaluation team by running benchmarks, preparing datasets, and helping analyse model performance.
responsibilities: Run existing benchmark scripts and record outputs
Prepare evaluation datasets from raw sources
Compare model outputs against reference answers
Create summary reports from evaluation results
eligibility: Pursuing or completed a degree in CS, Statistics, or related field
Availability: 2.5 hrs/day, 5 days/week

name: Data & Statistics
description: Data strategy, governance, analytics, and statistical inference

roles.title: Chief Data Officer
roles.about: Define and champion EduRankAI's data strategy, governance framework, and analytics culture.
responsibilities: Own the company-wide data strategy and governance framework
Build and lead the data team
Define data quality, privacy, and security standards
Partner with Product and AI teams on data-driven decision making
eligibility: 10+ years in data roles, 3+ in leadership
Strong understanding of data privacy regulations

roles.title: Data Science Lead
roles.about: Lead EduRankAI's data science function — setting the modelling direction, mentoring the team, and driving data-driven decisions.
responsibilities: Define data science strategy and prioritisation
Lead a team of data scientists and analysts
Own experimentation culture and A/B testing standards
Present insights and recommendations to leadership
eligibility: 7+ years in data science, 2+ in leadership
Strong statistics and ML background

roles.title: Analytics Lead
roles.about: Own EduRankAI's analytics infrastructure and decision-support systems.
responsibilities: Build and maintain analytics dashboards and reporting systems
Define company-wide metrics frameworks
Lead analytics engineering and BI tooling
Partner with product and business teams on data needs
eligibility: 6+ years in analytics or data engineering
Experience building analytics platforms at scale

roles.title: Data Governance Lead
roles.about: Establish and enforce data governance policies across EduRankAI.
responsibilities: Define data ownership, access controls, and retention policies
Build data cataloguing and lineage systems
Ensure compliance with data privacy regulations
Educate teams on data governance standards
eligibility: 5+ years in data governance or data management
Strong knowledge of GDPR, PDPB, and data privacy frameworks

roles.title: Senior Data Scientist
roles.about: Apply advanced statistical and ML methods to drive product decisions and user outcome improvements.
responsibilities: Design and implement predictive and personalisation models
Own A/B testing infrastructure and experiment analysis
Communicate findings to non-technical stakeholders
eligibility: 5+ years in data science or quantitative research
Strong foundation in statistics and experimental design

roles.title: Applied Statistician
roles.about: Own EduRankAI's statistical inference and experimentation methodology.
responsibilities: Design experiment protocols and power calculations
Analyse results of A/B tests and observational studies
Advise product and AI teams on statistical methodology
Build reusable statistical tooling
eligibility: 5+ years in applied statistics or quantitative research
MS/PhD in Statistics, Mathematics, or related field

roles.title: Evaluation Scientist
roles.about: Design and run EduRankAI's evaluation and experimentation systems.
responsibilities: Build and maintain the experimentation platform
Design metrics frameworks for product and model evaluation
Run rigorous A/B tests and interpret results
Establish statistical standards for decision-making
eligibility: 4+ years in experimentation or data science
Strong statistics background

roles.title: Data Engineer
roles.about: Build reliable data pipelines that move, transform, and serve data across EduRankAI's systems.
responsibilities: Design and maintain ETL/ELT pipelines
Build and monitor data quality checks
Support ML teams with feature engineering pipelines
eligibility: 3+ years in data or software engineering
Hands-on experience with pipeline orchestration tools

roles.title: Data Scientist
roles.about: Build and deploy models that drive product decisions and user experience improvements.
responsibilities: Develop predictive models for user behaviour and outcomes
Work with data engineering on feature pipelines
Communicate insights to product and business teams
eligibility: 3+ years in data science
Strong Python and statistical modelling skills

roles.title: Knowledge Engineer
roles.about: Build and maintain knowledge graphs and structured data systems that power EduRankAI's educational intelligence.
responsibilities: Design and build knowledge graph schemas for educational content
Develop entity extraction and relationship mapping pipelines
Collaborate with AI teams on knowledge-grounded model systems
Maintain ontologies and taxonomies for educational domains
eligibility: 3+ years in knowledge engineering or semantic technologies
Experience with graph databases (Neo4j, RDF)

roles.title: Synthetic Data Engineer
roles.about: Build systems to generate high-quality synthetic training data for EduRankAI's AI models.
responsibilities: Design and implement synthetic data generation pipelines
Evaluate synthetic data quality for downstream model training
Collaborate with ML teams on data requirements
Build tooling for controlled data augmentation
eligibility: 3+ years in data engineering or ML
Experience with synthetic data or data augmentation techniques

roles.title: Data Analyst
roles.about: Transform raw data into actionable insights through dashboards, reports, and analyses.
responsibilities: Build and maintain dashboards
Write SQL queries for ad-hoc data requests
Conduct cohort and funnel analyses
eligibility: 1+ year in analytics or quantitative degree
Solid SQL skills

roles.title: Data QA Analyst
roles.about: Ensure data quality across EduRankAI's data systems — identifying anomalies, inconsistencies, and integrity issues.
responsibilities: Run data quality checks on ingested and transformed datasets
Document data quality issues and track resolution
Collaborate with data engineers on quality monitoring
Build automated data quality test suites
eligibility: 1–2 years in data or analytics roles
Strong attention to detail and methodical approach

roles.title: Sampling Analyst
roles.about: Own the sampling and dataset quality process for EduRankAI's training and evaluation data.
responsibilities: Design stratified sampling strategies for training datasets
Evaluate dataset balance and coverage
Flag quality issues in sampled data
Collaborate with annotation and data teams
eligibility: Degree in Statistics, Mathematics, or Data Science
1+ year in a data or analytical role

roles.title: Data Annotator
roles.about: Label and annotate data to create high-quality training datasets that power EduRankAI's AI models.
responsibilities: Label text, images, or structured data per annotation guidelines
Maintain accuracy and consistency across large volumes
Flag ambiguous samples for review
eligibility: Any educational background
Strong reading comprehension
Availability: 2.5 hrs/day, 5 days/week

roles.title: Data Intern
roles.about: Support the data team with data cleaning, preparation, and exploratory analysis tasks.
responsibilities: Clean and standardise raw datasets
Assist with exploratory data analysis
Run basic SQL queries under guidance
eligibility: Pursuing a degree in Statistics, CS, Economics, or related field
Availability: 2.5 hrs/day, 5 days/week

name: Infrastructure
description: Cloud, platform, SRE, ML systems, and developer infrastructure

roles.title: CTO
roles.about: Define and drive EduRankAI's technology vision, architecture, and engineering culture.
responsibilities: Own the company's technology strategy and engineering roadmap
Lead all engineering functions
Make foundational architectural decisions
Foster a high-performance engineering culture
eligibility: 10+ years in software engineering, 3+ in senior technical leadership
Shipped production systems at scale

roles.title: Infrastructure Architect
roles.about: Design EduRankAI's system-wide infrastructure — ensuring scalability, reliability, and security at every layer.
responsibilities: Own the infrastructure architecture and design standards
Define networking, compute, and storage patterns
Review and approve major infrastructure changes
Build a blueprint for infrastructure as EduRankAI scales
eligibility: 8+ years in infrastructure or platform engineering
Experience architecting large-scale cloud-native systems

roles.title: Platform Engineering Lead
roles.about: Lead the team building EduRankAI's core engineering platform — the shared systems that all product teams depend on.
responsibilities: Lead the platform engineering team
Build shared developer tooling and internal services
Define platform standards and API contracts
Drive internal developer experience improvements
eligibility: 6+ years in engineering, 2+ in platform roles
Experience building internal platforms

roles.title: Senior Backend Engineer
roles.about: Design and build the backend systems that power EduRankAI's products.
responsibilities: Design and implement high-availability REST APIs
Own backend services end-to-end
Conduct code reviews and mentor junior engineers
eligibility: 5+ years in backend software engineering
Experience designing high-concurrency systems

roles.title: ML Systems Engineer
roles.about: Build the distributed systems infrastructure that powers EduRankAI's ML training and serving at scale.
responsibilities: Design distributed training infrastructure
Build high-throughput data loading and preprocessing systems
Optimise cluster utilisation for ML workloads
Collaborate with ML engineers on training pipeline performance
eligibility: 5+ years in systems or ML engineering
Experience with large-scale distributed ML training

roles.title: Site Reliability Engineer
roles.about: Ensure EduRankAI's systems are reliable, observable, and resilient.
responsibilities: Define and enforce SLOs/SLAs for all critical services
Build and maintain observability and alerting infrastructure
Lead incident response and post-mortems
Drive reliability improvements across the engineering org
eligibility: 5+ years in SRE, DevOps, or platform engineering
Experience building observability systems at scale

roles.title: Cloud Engineer
roles.about: Build and maintain EduRankAI's cloud infrastructure.
responsibilities: Provision and manage cloud resources
Implement infrastructure-as-code
Set up monitoring, alerting, and incident response
eligibility: 3+ years in cloud or infrastructure engineering

roles.title: DevOps / MLOps Engineer
roles.about: Build and maintain CI/CD and MLOps pipelines.
responsibilities: Design CI/CD pipelines for all engineering teams
Build MLOps infrastructure for model training and deployment
Implement automated testing and rollback workflows
eligibility: 3+ years in DevOps, platform, or MLOps engineering

roles.title: Database Engineer
roles.about: Own EduRankAI's database infrastructure — ensuring data is stored, queried, and maintained reliably.
responsibilities: Design and optimise relational and NoSQL database schemas
Manage database performance, backups, and replication
Build data access layers for application teams
Monitor and respond to database performance issues
eligibility: 3+ years in database engineering or administration
Strong SQL and performance tuning skills

roles.title: Backend Engineer
roles.about: Build APIs and backend services that power EduRankAI's product features.
responsibilities: Implement REST API endpoints
Write unit and integration tests
Participate in code reviews
eligibility: 1–2 years in backend development
Proficiency in Python or JavaScript/TypeScript

roles.title: DevOps Engineer (Junior)
roles.about: Support the DevOps and platform team with deployment, monitoring, and infrastructure tasks.
responsibilities: Support CI/CD pipeline operations
Monitor infrastructure and alert on anomalies
Assist with deployment and release management
eligibility: 1–2 years in DevOps or software engineering
Basic containerisation and Linux knowledge

roles.title: Cloud Support Engineer
roles.about: Support EduRankAI's engineering teams with cloud infrastructure setup, troubleshooting, and cost management.
responsibilities: Handle cloud infrastructure support requests
Assist with cost monitoring and tagging
Support teams with cloud tooling and access management
eligibility: 1+ year in cloud or IT support
Cloud fundamentals certification preferred

roles.title: DevOps Intern
roles.about: Support EduRankAI's DevOps team with operational tasks and monitoring.
responsibilities: Monitor dashboards and escalate anomalies
Help document infrastructure components
Learn containerisation and cloud tooling
eligibility: Pursuing a degree in CS, Engineering, or IT
Availability: 2.5 hrs/day, 5 days/week

roles.title: Engineering Intern
roles.about: Support EduRankAI's engineering teams with development tasks, testing, and documentation.
responsibilities: Assist with feature implementation under senior guidance
Write test cases and documentation
Participate in code reviews as an observer
eligibility: Pursuing CS or Engineering degree
Basic programming experience
Availability: 2.5 hrs/day, 5 days/week

roles.title: Engineering Apprentice
roles.about: A structured apprenticeship for those building foundational engineering skills in a real-world AI company context.
responsibilities: Complete structured learning modules alongside team projects
Contribute to small, well-defined engineering tasks
Attend team standups and engineering reviews
Build a portfolio of work completed during the apprenticeship
eligibility: No prior professional experience required
Strong academic background in STEM
High motivation and self-discipline
Availability: 2 hrs/day minimum

name: Product & UX
description: Product management, design, UX research, and conversation design

roles.title: CPO
roles.about: Define and drive EduRankAI's product vision, strategy, and roadmap.
responsibilities: Define EduRankAI's product vision and long-term roadmap
Lead and grow the product and UX team
Establish product rituals: discovery, delivery, retrospectives
eligibility: 10+ years in product management, 3+ in senior product leadership

roles.title: Head of Product
roles.about: Own EduRankAI's product roadmap and lead the product team.
responsibilities: Define and own the product roadmap
Lead product managers and UX researchers
Drive discovery and delivery cycles
Build a product culture of user-centricity and experimentation
eligibility: 7+ years in product management, 2+ in leadership

roles.title: Design Lead
roles.about: Lead EduRankAI's design function — setting the design language, mentoring designers, and owning the end-to-end user experience.
responsibilities: Define EduRankAI's design system and visual language
Lead a team of UX/UI designers
Own the interaction design for all core product areas
Establish design review and critique processes
eligibility: 6+ years in UX or product design, 2+ in lead role

roles.title: User Experience Lead
roles.about: Own the holistic user experience across EduRankAI's products — from first touch to long-term engagement.
responsibilities: Map and optimise the end-to-end user journey
Lead UX research strategy and execution
Establish usability standards and accessibility baselines
Partner with product and engineering on experience quality
eligibility: 6+ years in UX design or research

roles.title: Product Manager
roles.about: Own and drive high-impact product areas from discovery through delivery.
responsibilities: Own a product area from discovery to launch
Write clear PRDs and user stories
Conduct user interviews
Define and track KPIs for your product area
eligibility: 4+ years in product management

roles.title: UX Research Lead
roles.about: Lead EduRankAI's user research function — ensuring all product decisions are grounded in deep user understanding.
responsibilities: Plan and execute qualitative and quantitative research studies
Synthesise findings into actionable product insights
Build the research repository and knowledge management system
Advocate for users at the product decision table
eligibility: 5+ years in UX research
Experience with mixed-methods research in technology products

roles.title: Conversation Designer
roles.about: Design the conversational experiences for EduRankAI's AI tutoring and educational systems.
responsibilities: Design dialogue flows for AI tutoring and chatbot interfaces
Define tone of voice and conversation patterns
Work with ML and product teams on conversational AI features
Evaluate conversation quality through user testing
eligibility: 4+ years in conversation design, UX writing, or content design
Experience designing for AI-powered products

roles.title: Frontend Engineer
roles.about: Build the user interfaces that learners interact with every day.
responsibilities: Implement UI components in React
Write accessible, responsive HTML/CSS
Optimise frontend performance
eligibility: 1–2 years in frontend development or strong portfolio

roles.title: Product Analyst
roles.about: Provide analytical support to the product team — tracking feature performance and surfacing user insights.
responsibilities: Track and report on product metrics and KPIs
Conduct cohort and funnel analyses
Support A/B test setup and analysis
Partner with PMs on feature evaluation
eligibility: 1–2 years in product analytics or data analysis
Strong SQL and analytical skills

roles.title: UX Analyst
roles.about: Analyse user behaviour data to inform UX decisions at EduRankAI.
responsibilities: Analyse session recordings and heatmaps
Run usability test sessions and document findings
Support UX researchers with quantitative analysis
Track key UX metrics across products
eligibility: 1–2 years in UX analysis or product analytics

roles.title: UX Intern
roles.about: Support EduRankAI's UX research team with participant recruitment, note-taking, and research operations.
responsibilities: Recruit participants for usability tests
Take detailed notes during research sessions
Synthesise findings into affinity maps
eligibility: Pursuing a degree in Design, Psychology, HCI, or related field
Availability: 2.5 hrs/day, 5 days/week

roles.title: Product Intern
roles.about: Support EduRankAI's product team in feature development, user research, and analysis tasks.
responsibilities: Assist in drafting user stories and feature specs
Conduct desk research and competitive analysis
Help track sprint progress
eligibility: Pursuing or recently completed any undergraduate degree
Availability: 2.5 hrs/day, 5 days/week
